allow: Bash(node -e "const XLSX = require\('xlsx'\); const wb = XLSX.readFile\('public/Random Encounter Tables.xlsx'\); console.log\('Sheets:', wb.SheetNames\); const ws = wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]]; const data = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(ws, {header:1}\); console.log\('First sheet rows \(first 10\):', JSON.stringify\(data.slice\(0,10\), null, 2\)\);")
